chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D- 1729 of 2023 ( Muhammad Hussain Bhutto vs. P.O Sindh and others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Present; Irshad Ali Shah, J Zulfiqar Ali Sangi, J Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on MA No.7450/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 13-03-2024 Syed Imtiaz Ali Shah Jillani, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>>..<<<<<< The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for direction against Mukhtiakar Taluka Gambat to conduct Jalse-Aam and then to change the Foti Khata for the property left by late Muhammad Bachal. If for the sake of arguments, it is believed that the foti khata for the property left by late Muhammad Bachal is not being changed by Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Gambat then the petitioner has the remedy to exhaust for redressal of his grievance by approaching the Revenue highups. Without exhausting such remedy approaching this Court for the purpose is not appearing to be justified. Consequently, the instant Constitutional Petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
